translations.en: I'm going to the conference tomorrow.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi đi dự hội nghị.
translations.nl: Ik ga morgen naar de conferentie.
translations.hi: मैं कल सम्मेलन में जा रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg skal på konferanse i morgen.
translations.sv: Jag ska på konferens i morgon.
translations.da: Jeg skal til konference i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日カンファレンスに行きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; syntactic subject of the verb 'vais'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; expresses movement/going.
Preposition 'à' fused with definite article 'le' (contraction 'à + le'); introduces the destination NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à/au'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase to indicate time.

sentences.target: Tu présentes ton projet au congrès.

translations.fr: Tu présentes ton projet au congrès.
translations.en: You're presenting your project at the conference.
translations.es: Presentas tu proyecto en el congreso.
translations.de: Du stellst dein Projekt auf der Konferenz vor.
translations.it: Presenti il tuo progetto al congresso.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在会议上介绍你的项目。
translations.yue: 你喺會議上介紹你嘅項目。
translations.ru: Ты представляешь свой проект на конференции.
translations.pt: Você apresenta seu projeto no congresso.
translations.he: אתה מציג את הפרויקט שלך בכנס.
translations.vi: Bạn trình bày dự án của mình tại hội nghị.
translations.nl: Je presenteert je project op de conferentie.
translations.uk: Ти презентуєш свій проєкт на конференції.
translations.hi: तुम सम्मेलन में अपना प्रोजेक्ट प्रस्तुत कर रहे हो।
translations.el: Παρουσιάζεις το έργο σου στο συνέδριο.
translations.nb: Du presenterer prosjektet ditt på konferansen.
translations.sv: Du presenterar ditt projekt på konferensen.
translations.da: Du præsenterer dit projekt på konferencen.
translations.ja: あなたはカンファレンスで自分のプロジェクトを発表します。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'présentes'.
Transitive verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes a direct object ('ton projet').
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular; agrees with 'projet' and marks possession.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'présentes'.
Preposition 'à' fused with 'le' (contraction 'à + le'); introduces the indirect/destination NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à/au'.

sentences.target: On s’inscrit au congrès en ligne.

translations.fr: On s’inscrit au congrès en ligne.
translations.en: We sign up for the conference online.
translations.es: Nos inscribimos en el congreso en línea.
translations.de: Wir melden uns online für die Konferenz an.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在线报名参加会议。
translations.yue: 我哋上網報名參加會議。
translations.pt: Nós nos inscrevemos no congresso pela internet.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đăng ký hội nghị trực tuyến.
translations.ar: نحن نسجل في المؤتمر عبر الإنترنت.
translations.nl: We schrijven ons online in voor de conferentie.
translations.hi: हम ऑनलाइन सम्मेलन के लिए पंजीकरण करते हैं।
translations.pl: Rejestrujemy się na konferencję przez internet.
translations.nb: Vi melder oss på konferansen på nettet.
translations.id: Kami mendaftar untuk konferensi secara online.
translations.sv: Vi anmäler oss til konferensen på nätet.
translations.da: Vi tilmelder os konferencen på nettet.
translations.ja: 私たちはオンラインでカンファレンスに申し込みます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; subject of 'inscrit'.
Clitic reflexive pronoun, elided before vowel; marks the pronominal verb 's’inscrire' and corefers with the subject.
Verb, present indicative 3rd person singular in pronominal use ('s’inscrire'); denotes the act of registering.
Preposition 'à' fused with 'le' (contraction 'à + le'); introduces the location/event NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à/au'.
Preposition introducing the manner/complement 'en ligne' ('online').
Common noun; complement of 'en' forming the adverbial expression 'en ligne' (online).

translations.en: You're coming back from the conference tired.
translations.de: Ihr kommt müde von der Konferenz zurück.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们从会议回来时很累。
translations.yue: 你哋由會議度返嚟，好攰。
translations.vi: Các bạn trở về từ hội nghị, mệt mỏi.
translations.nl: Jullie komen moe terug van de conferentie.
translations.hi: आप लोग सम्मेलन से थके हुए लौट रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Dere kommer slitne tilbake fra konferansen.
translations.id: Kalian pulang dari konferensi dalam keadaan lelah.
translations.sv: Ni kommer tillbaka från konferensen trötta.
translations.ro: Vă întoarceți de la congres obosiți.
translations.da: I kommer trætte tilbage fra konferencen.
translations.ja: あなたたちはカンファレンスから戻ってきて疲れています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person plural/formal subject pronoun; subject of 'revenez'.
Intransitive verb, present indicative 2nd person plural; denotes returning.
Preposition 'de' fused with definite article 'le' (contraction 'de + le'); introduces source/origin NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de/du'.
Adjective, masculine plural; subject-oriented depictive complement describing the state of 'vous' upon returning.

On s’inscrit au congrès en ligne.

We sign up for the conference online.
You're coming back from the conference tired.
